---
title: "Welcome"
title-block-banner: true
page-layout: article
---

# Welcome {.unnumbered}

<div class="cover-hero">
<h1>From Data to Impact</h1>
<p>A structured, project-based path from Python fundamentals to production-ready data science, with the engineering discipline to make it matter.</p>
<p class="cover-author">By <a href="https://sambaiga.github.io/" style="color:#38BDF8;font-weight:600">Anthony Faustine</a>&nbsp;&nbsp;<a href="https://github.com/sambaiga" title="GitHub" style="color:#94A3B8"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>&nbsp;<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/sambaiga" title="LinkedIn" style="color:#94A3B8"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>&nbsp;<a href="mailto:sambaiga@gmail.com" title="Email" style="color:#94A3B8"><i class="bi bi-envelope-at"></i></a></p>

<div class="cover-stat-row">
<div class="cover-stat">
  <span class="stat-value">10</span>
  <span class="stat-label">Parts</span>
</div>
<div class="cover-stat">
  <span class="stat-value">20+</span>
  <span class="stat-label">Chapters</span>
</div>
<div class="cover-stat">
  <span class="stat-value">3</span>
  <span class="stat-label">Parts complete</span>
</div>
</div>

<a href="tutorials/01-python-basics/01-python-core.ipynb" class="btn-cover btn-primary-cover"><i class="bi bi-play-fill"></i> Start learning</a>
<a href="preface.qmd" class="btn-cover btn-secondary-cover"><i class="bi bi-book"></i> Read the preface</a>
</div>

::: {.callout-note icon=false #callout-guide}
## How this book works

Every chapter is a Jupyter notebook or QMD file meant to be **run top to bottom**, not just read. Along the way you will see four recurring markers:

| Marker | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill" style="color:#0369A1"></i> **Key Concept** | The core idea, precisely defined |
| <i class="bi bi-puzzle-fill" style="color:#009E73"></i> **Activity** | Hands-on challenge: fill in the `...` yourself before moving on |
| <i class="bi bi-bug-fill" style="color:#DC2626"></i> **Common Mistake** | A bug pattern worth recognising on sight |
| <i class="bi bi-lightbulb-fill" style="color:#7C3AED"></i> **Pro Tip** | A production-grade habit |
:::

<p class="section-label">Your learning path</p>

:::: {.grid .roadmap-grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-xl-3}
<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-1"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-braces-asterisk act-icon act-icon-1"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Act 1 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Parts 1–3 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Complete</span>
<h3 class="act-name">Build the Foundation</h3>
<p class="act-desc">Language, data wrangling, and engineering practices</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
  <li><a href="tutorials/01-python-basics/01-python-core.ipynb"><span class="ch-num">01</span><span class="ch-name">Foundations</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
  <li><a href="tutorials/01-python-basics/08-pandas-core.ipynb"><span class="ch-num">02</span><span class="ch-name">Data Analysis</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
  <li><a href="tutorials/02-dev-tools/00-vscode-setup.qmd"><span class="ch-num">03</span><span class="ch-name">Dev Tools</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-xl-3}
<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-2"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-diagram-3 act-icon act-icon-2"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Act 2 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Parts 4–6 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Coming soon</span>
<h3 class="act-name">Master the Models</h3>
<p class="act-desc">Classical ML, deep learning, and large language models</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
  <li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">04</span><span class="ch-name">Classical ML</span><span class="ch-soon">soon</span></span></li>
  <li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">05</span><span class="ch-name">Deep Learning</span><span class="ch-soon">soon</span></span></li>
  <li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">06</span><span class="ch-name">LLMs</span><span class="ch-soon">soon</span></span></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-xl-3}
<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-3"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-cloud-arrow-up act-icon act-icon-3"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Act 3 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Parts 7–8 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Coming soon</span>
<h3 class="act-name">Ship to Production</h3>
<p class="act-desc">MLOps pipelines, CI/CD, and production monitoring</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
  <li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">07</span><span class="ch-name">MLOps</span><span class="ch-soon">soon</span></span></li>
  <li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">08</span><span class="ch-name">Production Monitoring</span><span class="ch-soon">soon</span></span></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-xl-3}
<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-4"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-gem act-icon act-icon-4"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Act 4 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Parts 9–10 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Coming soon</span>
<h3 class="act-name">Design for Impact</h3>
<p class="act-desc">Scalable ML systems and value-driven AI</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
  <li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">09</span><span class="ch-name">ML System Design</span><span class="ch-soon">soon</span></span></li>
  <li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">10</span><span class="ch-name">Value-driven AI</span><span class="ch-soon">soon</span></span></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
:::

::::

<p style="margin-top:28px;color:#94A3B8;font-size:0.8rem;">Parts are released chapter by chapter as each reaches the same standard as Acts 1–3. &nbsp;<a href="https://github.com/sambaiga/ds-mlops-path" style="color:#64748B">View source on GitHub</a></p>
